data.title: Ukraine Open to Peace Talks with Russia in Azerbaijan
data.description: Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelensky has expressed willingness to engage in peace talks with Russia in Azerbaijan, provided that Russia is prepared for such discussions. According to Odaily, this statement comes amid ongoing tensions between the two nations. The potential talks aim to address the conflict and seek a resolution.

data.title: Researchers cracked a 15-bit ECC key and received a 1-bit Bitcoin reward.
data.description: Independent researcher Giancarlo Lelli has been awarded the Q-Day Prize and one Bitcoin by quantum security startup Project Eleven for successfully cracking the encryption key protecting Bitcoin. Lelli used publicly available quantum hardware and a variant of Shor's algorithm to crack the 15-bit encryption key out of 32,767 possibilities. This quantum attack is 512 times more difficult than the 6-bit key record set in September 2025. Project Eleven CEO Alex Pruden stated that the resource requirements for such attacks are declining, and approximately 6.9 million Bitcoins are currently in vulnerable static addresses, including 1 million held by Satoshi Nakamoto. The Bitcoin network has proposed BIP-360 to introduce quantum-resistant address types, and platforms such as Ethereum, Ripple, and Tron have begun releasing plans to transition to post-quantum defenses.

data.title: XRP's Potential for Growth Supported by Technical and On-Chain Indicators
data.description:
XRP has experienced a significant rally, increasing by over 30% in the past three months, with technical and on-chain indicators suggesting further potential gains for the XRP/USD pair. According to Cointelegraph, several factors contribute to this optimistic outlook, including exchange outflows, positive whale flows, and strong demand for exchange-traded funds (ETFs).

As of Saturday, the XRP Ledger (XRPL) recorded nearly 35 million XRP in exchange outflows within 24 hours, marking the sixth-largest daily outflow of the year, as reported by Santiment. Such outflows often indicate that investors are transferring tokens to private wallets or custody, reducing the immediate supply available for sale. Historically, these spikes have preceded modest rallies in XRP's price. For instance, a similar spike in March led to a 20% rebound, while February's surge resulted in a 48% to 50% increase. These precedents suggest that the recent withdrawal spike could lead to higher XRP prices in May. Additionally, U.S.-based spot XRP ETFs have seen three consecutive weeks of net inflows, totaling approximately $82.88 million as of Saturday, according to SoSoValue data. This trend has pushed the total assets under management to $1.1 billion, indicating growing institutional interest in XRP products.

Positive whale flows further bolster the optimistic sentiment. Data from CryptoQuant reveals that XRP whale flows have turned positive, indicating that larger wallets are accumulating rather than distributing. The 90-day moving average of XRPL whale flows has returned to positive territory after being negative for much of early 2026. Historically, positive whale-flow regimes have preceded stronger XRP price trends, such as the rally from May to July 2025. This shift supports the broader accumulation narrative already evident in exchange outflows and ETF inflows.

XRP's technical structure also supports the potential for further gains. The XRP/USD pair has been trading within a falling wedge pattern for the past two years, characterized by two downward-sloping, converging trend lines. The recent rebound from the lower trend line support in April increases the likelihood of a move toward the upper boundary. This target zone aligns with the 50-week EMA and the 0.5 Fibonacci retracement near $1.87–$1.89, approximately 30% above current levels, by June. However, a decisive break below the wedge's lower trend line could invalidate the bullish narrative, potentially leading to a decline toward the $0.98 mark, aligning with the wedge's apex point and the 0.786 Fibonacci line.

data.title: Jupiter Litterbox Trust Increases JUP Holdings in October
data.description: Jupiter Litterbox Trust has recently expanded its holdings by acquiring 211,474 JUP tokens, valued at approximately $36,000. According to Foresight News, the trust has accumulated a total of 9,405,535 JUP tokens this month, with an estimated value of $1.63 million. To date, the trust's total purchases amount to 113,508,785 JUP tokens, valued at around $19.76 million.

data.title: FF team transfers $13 million worth of tokens from new wallet address
data.description: According to onchainschool.pro, the FF team address (0xeF6...7071) transferred $13 million worth of tokens to a new wallet, from which they will then be distributed to other participants or fund wallets. This is the largest transfer record for the project to date. An hour ago, approximately $1 million worth of tokens were further transferred from the aforementioned wallet and eventually deposited into exchanges.

data.title: FF Token Unlocking Distributes $13 Million Across Multiple Addresses
data.description: On April 25, a significant unlocking of FF tokens valued at $13 million occurred. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the team responsible for the tokens has distributed them across several addresses. Notably, tokens worth $1 million have already been transferred to a centralized exchange (CEX).

data.title: AI Trust Network Trusta AI Resumes Full Operations with LayerZero
data.description: AI Trust Network Trusta AI has announced the full resumption of its operations through LayerZero's cross-chain functionality. According to Foresight News, the network had previously faced disruptions due to LayerZero's shift from a single DVN configuration to a multi-DVN redundancy setup. Trusta AI's single DVN configuration was unable to meet the new verification requirements. Upon identifying the issue, the team promptly initiated an upgrade, transitioning to a multi-DVN configuration and enhancing redundancy. They completed the necessary verification adjustments, allowing all cross-chain functionalities to be restored. Users can now perform cross-chain operations with Trusta AI as usual.

data.title: Iranian Speaker Dismisses Israeli Defense Minister's Remarks as 'Nonsense'
data.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf has dismissed recent comments made by Israeli Defense Minister Katz, labeling them as 'nonsense.' According to NS3.AI, Qalibaf's response came via a social media post on April 24, following Katz's video statement on April 23. In his statement, Katz indicated that Israel was ready to resume military operations against Iran, pending approval from the United States.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs See Nine-Day Inflow Streak, Totaling $2.12 Billion
data.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced a consistent inflow streak over nine days from April 14 to April 24, accumulating approximately $2.12 billion. According to NS3.AI, the most significant inflow occurred on April 17, with net inflows reaching $663.91 million.

data.title: APE Token Experiences Significant Surge in 24 Hours
data.description: APE token has seen a notable increase in its value, reaching a peak of 0.292 USDT within the day. According to Foresight News, the current price stands at 0.186 USDT, marking a 66.28% rise over the past 24 hours.

data.title: Turkey Considers Role in Strait of Hormuz Mine Clearance
data.description: Turkey's Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan has stated that Turkey may consider participating in mine clearance operations in the Strait of Hormuz following a potential peace agreement between Iran and the United States. According to Odaily, a technical team is expected to carry out the mine clearance work in the strait once the agreement is reached. Turkey views such actions as a humanitarian responsibility and maintains a positive stance. However, if this technical multinational alliance becomes a party to a new conflict, Turkey will reassess its position. Issues related to Iran's nuclear program are anticipated to be addressed in the next round of talks in Pakistan.

data.title: Turkish Foreign Minister: Türkiye may consider participating in mine-clearing operations in the Strait of Hormuz after the US and Iran reach an agreement.
data.description: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fedan stated that Turkey might consider participating in demining operations in the Strait of Hormuz should a peace agreement be reached between Iran and the United States. It is expected that a technical team will conduct demining work in the strait after an agreement is reached. Turkey, in principle, views such actions as a humanitarian responsibility and takes a positive attitude. However, if this technical multinational coalition becomes a party in a new conflict, Turkey will reassess its position. It believes that issues related to Iran's nuclear program can be resolved in the next round of talks to be held in Pakistan. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ethereum NFT Trading Volume Surges Over 72% in 24 Hours
data.description:
Ethereum's NFT trading volume has seen a significant increase, reaching $3.934 million in the past 24 hours, according to ChainCatcher. This marks a 72.78% rise in activity. Notably, Bored Ape Yacht Club (BAYC) NFTs recorded a trading volume exceeding $1.45 million, with a 24-hour increase of 266.35%. Countyard NFTs also experienced a substantial rise, with trading volumes around $980,000, marking an 88.1% increase.

Furthermore, Ethereum's NFT trading volume has surpassed $55 million, significantly higher than the approximately $37.095 million recorded in March.

data.title: SpaceX IPO May Divert Liquidity from Bitcoin and Risk Assets
data.description: The anticipated $75 billion initial public offering (IPO) of SpaceX is expected to attract significant liquidity, potentially impacting Bitcoin and other risk assets. According to NS3.AI, the combined effect of potential IPOs from companies like OpenAI and Anthropic could result in a liquidity shift exceeding $240 billion by the end of the year.

data.title: AI TRENDS | DeepSeek-V4 Preview Version Launched and Open-Sourced
data.description: On April 24, DeepSeek-V4's preview version was officially launched and open-sourced. According to Jin10, Baidu's Qianfan platform under Baidu Intelligent Cloud has adapted Day0 to provide API services. DeepSeek-V4 features a long context with millions of tokens and is available in two versions: DeepSeek-V4-Pro and DeepSeek-V4-Flash. Currently, enterprise users and developers can directly access DeepSeek-V4-Pro through the Baidu Qianfan console or API, while DeepSeek-V4-Flash will soon be fully available.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Qt Group and Chengmai Technology Collaborate on Smart Cockpit Technology at Beijing Auto Show
data.description:
On April 25, Jin10 reported that the 19th Beijing International Automotive Exhibition commenced on April 24. Qt Group's Global Senior Vice President, Erik Rehn, visited Chengmai Technology's booth, where both parties engaged in in-depth discussions on core smart cockpit technologies. According to Jin10, the focus was on key applications of 3D Human-Machine Interface (HMI) in smart cockpits, including central control screens, digital instruments, AR-HUD, and ADAS visualization interactions. The discussions covered technological trends and practical experiences, with preliminary plans for potential future project collaborations.

As a significant collaboration showcase at the Beijing Auto Show, Chengmai Technology demonstrated the Outpace panoramic cockpit HMI project, jointly developed with Qt Group. This project utilizes Rendering as a Service (RaaS) and SR technologies to deliver real-time 3D rendering and real-time environmental perception visualization on mid-range, cost-effective automotive-grade chips.

data.title: Stablecoins Evolving into Global Financial Infrastructure, a16z Report Finds
data.description:
A recent study by a16z highlights the transformation of stablecoins from initial roles as transaction settlement tools and value storage to becoming a part of global financial infrastructure. According to Odaily, the report indicates that following the regulatory clarity provided by the U.S. GENIUS Act, the stablecoin market has seen accelerated growth. By the first quarter of 2026, adjusted transaction volume reached approximately $4.5 trillion.

The report reveals a 128% year-on-year increase in consumer-to-business (C2B) stablecoin transactions, totaling 284.6 million transactions. Additionally, monthly collateral deposits for stablecoin card projects surged from nearly zero at the end of 2024 to over $300 million by early 2026, reflecting the rapid expansion of stablecoin payment scenarios.

Furthermore, the velocity of stablecoin circulation has increased from 2.6 times at the beginning of 2024 to six times, indicating a shift from being held to being frequently used. a16z suggests that the focus of stablecoin applications is moving from cross-border payments to local payment infrastructure, with significant growth observed in markets such as Asia and Brazil.

data.title: a16z: Stablecoins are evolving from trading tools into core financial infrastructure, with Q1 trading volume reaching $4.5 trillion.
data.description: A new study by a16z indicates that stablecoins are evolving from initial transaction settlement tools and stores of value into global financial infrastructure. Data shows that the stablecoin market has accelerated further growth following the clarification of regulations driven by the US GENIUS Act, with adjusted transaction volume reaching approximately $4.5 trillion in the first quarter of 2026. The report shows that consumer-to-merchant (C2B) stablecoin transactions increased by 128% year-on-year, reaching 284.6 million transactions. Monthly collateralized deposits for stablecoin card projects also grew from near zero at the end of 2024 to over $300 million at the beginning of 2026, reflecting the rapid expansion of stablecoin payment scenarios. Meanwhile, the velocity of stablecoin circulation has increased from 2.6 times to 6 times since the beginning of 2024, indicating a shift from "being held" to "being frequently used." a16z believes that the focus of stablecoin applications is shifting from cross-border payments to local payment infrastructure, particularly evident in markets such as Asia and Brazil.

data.title: Whale Opens Leveraged Long Position on Brent Crude Oil
data.description: A significant market player has initiated a leveraged long position on Brent crude oil, valued at $20 million. According to NS3.AI, this move reflects a bullish sentiment towards the commodity, potentially influencing market dynamics. The position is leveraged at five times, indicating a high level of confidence in future price increases. This development may impact investor strategies and market volatility in the coming period.
